alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mmol/L iodoacetamide for 1 hour at RT
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 55 mmol/L iodoacetamide for 1 hour at RT
cleavage agent: digested with sequencing-grade modified trypsin (Promega) at an enzyme/substrate ratio of 1:50 overnight at RT
fragmentation method: isolated and fragmented by higher energy collision dissociation
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mmol/L dithiothreitol for 1 hour at 56°C
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mmol/L dithiothreitol for 1 hour at 56°C
